titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Masadah Ibn Ziyad
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Masadah Ibn Ziyad

segments: ه عن مسعدة بن زياد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن هارون بن مسلم، عن مسعدة ابن زياد.
arabic.text: ه عن مسعدة بن زياد فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و الحميريّ جميعا عن هارون بن مسلم، عن مسعدة ابن زياد.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Masadah ibn Ziyad, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Harun ibn Muslim, from Masadah ibn Ziyad.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Masadah ibn Ziyad, I have narrated it from my father and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Saʿd ibn Abdullah and Al-Himyari together, from Harun ibn Muslim, from Masadah ibn Ziyad.
